about_intro: Software Engineer | Full-Stack Developer | Data Science Enthusiast
about_bio: I am Sharmarke Abdi Abdullahi, a passionate software engineer from Dhaka, Bangladesh, currently pursuing a BSc in Software Engineering at Daffodil International University. I specialize in full-stack development, data science, and AI. My mission is to build impactful technology solutions that solve real-world problems in Somalia and across Africa.
about_career_text: To become a leading tech entrepreneur and drive digital transformation in emerging markets, focusing on healthtech, edtech, and fintech.
about_mission_text: To leverage technology for social good and empower the next generation of African developers.
about_vision_text: Building scalable tech ecosystems that solve Africa's most pressing challenges, starting with education and healthcare.
personal_quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do. And I love building solutions that change lives.
